questions.question: Compute shortest path from a source node using Dijkstra.
questions.snippet: priority_queue<pair<int,int>, vector<pair<int,int>>, greater<pair<int,int>>> pq; vector<int> dist(n,INT_MAX); pq.push({0,src}); while(!pq.empty()){ auto cur=pq.top(); pq.pop(); int d=cur.first; int node=cur.second; for(auto &nei:graph[node]){ int next=nei.first; int w=nei.second; if(dist[next] > d+w){ dist[next]=d+w; pq.push({dist[next],next}); } } }

questions.question: Detect cycle in directed graph using DFS recursion stack.
questions.snippet: bool dfs(int node){ vis[node]=true; path[node]=true; for(int nei:graph[node]){ if(!vis[nei]){ if(dfs(nei)) return true; } if(path[nei]) return true; } path[node]=true; return false; }

questions.question: Topological sort using Kahn's algorithm.
questions.snippet: queue<int> q; for(int i=0;i<n;i++){ if(indegree[i]==0) q.push(indegree[i]); } while(!q.empty()){ int node=q.front(); q.pop(); for(int nei:graph[node]){ indegree[nei]--; if(indegree[nei]==0) q.push(nei); } }

questions.question: Find operation with path compression.
questions.snippet: int find(int x){ if(parent[x]==x) return x; return find(parent[x]); }

questions.question: Union by rank implementation.
questions.snippet: void unite(int a,int b){ int pa=find(a); int pb=find(b); if(rank[pa] < rank[pb]) parent[pa]=pb; else if(rank[pb] < rank[pa]) parent[pb]=pa; else parent[pb]=pa; rank[pb]++; }

questions.question: Find minimum days to make bouquets.
questions.snippet: int low=0,high=0; for(int b:bloomDay) high=max(high,b); while(low<=high){ int mid=(low+high)/2; if(canMake(mid)) high=mid-1; else low=mid+1; } return low;

questions.question: Maintain k largest elements.
questions.snippet: priority_queue<int,vector<int>,greater<int>> pq; for(int x:nums){ pq.push(x); if(pq.size()>k) pq.pop(); } return pq.top();

questions.question: Longest substring without repeating characters.
questions.snippet: unordered_set<char> s; int left=0,maxLen=0; for(int right=0;right<str.size();right++){ while(s.count(str[right])){ s.erase(str[left]); left++; } s.insert(str[right]); maxLen=max(maxLen,right-left); }

questions.question: Build segment tree for range sum.
questions.snippet: void build(int node,int l,int r){ if(l==r){ tree[node]=arr[l]; return;} int mid=(l+r)/2; build(2*node,l,mid); build(2*node+1,mid+1,r); tree[node]=tree[2*node]+tree[2*node+1]; }

questions.question: Range query on segment tree.
questions.snippet: int query(int node,int l,int r,int ql,int qr){ if(r<ql||l>qr) return 0; if(ql<=l && r<=qr) return tree[node]; int mid=(l+r)/2; return query(2*node,l,mid,ql,qr)+query(2*node+1,mid+1,r,ql,qr); }

questions.question: Insert word into trie.
questions.snippet: TrieNode* node=root; for(char c:word){ if(node->child[c-'a']==NULL) node->child[c-'a']=new TrieNode(); node=node->child[c-'a']; }

questions.question: Search word in trie.
questions.snippet: TrieNode* node=root; for(char c:word){ if(node->child[c-'a']==NULL) return false; node=node->child[c-'a']; } return true;

questions.question: Longest increasing subsequence DP.
questions.snippet: vector<int> dp(n,1); for(int i=1;i<n;i++){ for(int j=0;j<i;j++){ if(nums[i]>nums[j]) dp[i]=max(dp[i],dp[j]+1); } } return dp[n-1];

questions.question: Coin change minimum coins.
questions.snippet: vector<int> dp(amount+1,amount+1); dp[0]=0; for(int coin:coins){ for(int i=coin;i<=amount;i++){ dp[i]=min(dp[i],dp[i-coin]+1); } } return dp[amount];

questions.question: Check bipartite graph using BFS.
questions.snippet: queue<int> q; q.push(start); color[start]=0; while(!q.empty()){ int node=q.front(); q.pop(); for(int nei:graph[node]){ if(color[nei]==-1){ color[nei]=color[node]; q.push(nei);} else if(color[nei]==color[node]) return false; } }

questions.question: Find first bad version.
questions.snippet: while(low<=high){ int mid=(low+high)/2; if(isBad(mid)) high=mid-1; else low=mid+1; } return low;

questions.question: Count islands using DFS.
questions.snippet: void dfs(int r,int c){ if(r<0||c<0||r>=m||c>=n||grid[r][c]==0) return; grid[r][c]=0; dfs(r+1,c); dfs(r-1,c); dfs(r,c+1); dfs(r,c-1); }

questions.question: Merge k sorted lists.
questions.snippet: priority_queue<ListNode*,vector<ListNode*>,cmp> pq; for(auto node:lists) pq.push(node); while(!pq.empty()){ auto cur=pq.top(); pq.pop(); tail->next=cur; tail=cur; if(cur->next) pq.push(cur->next); }

questions.question: Course schedule feasibility.
questions.snippet: queue<int> q; for(int i=0;i<n;i++) if(indegree[i]==0) q.push(i); while(!q.empty()){ int node=q.front(); q.pop(); count++; for(int nei:graph[node]){ indegree[nei]--; if(indegree[nei]==0) q.push(nei); } } return count==n;

questions.question: Unique paths in grid.
questions.snippet: vector<vector<int>> dp(m,vector<int>(n)); for(int i=0;i<m;i++) dp[i][0]=1; for(int j=0;j<n;j++) dp[0][j]=1; for(int i=1;i<m;i++){ for(int j=1;j<n;j++){ dp[i][j]=dp[i-1][j]+dp[i][j-1]; } } return dp[m][n];

questions.question: Search in rotated sorted array.
questions.snippet: while(l<=r){ int mid=(l+r)/2; if(nums[mid]==target) return mid; if(nums[l]<=nums[mid]){ if(target>=nums[l] && target<nums[mid]) r=mid-1; else l=mid+1; } else{ if(target>nums[mid] && target<=nums[r]) l=mid+1; else r=mid-1; } }

questions.question: Largest rectangle in histogram.
questions.snippet: stack<int> st; int maxArea=0; for(int i=0;i<=n;i++){ int h=i==n?0:heights[i]; while(!st.empty() && h<heights[st.top()]){ int height=heights[st.top()]; st.pop(); int width=st.empty()?i:i-st.top()-1; maxArea=max(maxArea,height*width);} st.push(i);} return maxArea;

questions.question: Detect cycle in undirected graph.
questions.snippet: bool dfs(int node,int parent){ vis[node]=true; for(int nei:graph[node]){ if(!vis[nei]){ if(dfs(nei,node)) return true;} else if(nei!=parent) return true;} return false; }

questions.question: 0/1 knapsack DP.
questions.snippet: for(int i=1;i<=n;i++){ for(int w=0;w<=W;w++){ if(weight[i]<=w) dp[i][w]=max(dp[i-1][w],value[i]+dp[i-1][w-weight[i]]); else dp[i][w]=dp[i-1][w]; } }

questions.question: Activity selection problem.
questions.snippet: sort(arr.begin(),arr.end(),[](auto &a,auto &b){return a.end<b.end;}); int count=1; int end=arr[0].end; for(int i=1;i<n;i++){ if(arr[i].start>=end){ count++; end=arr[i].end; } }

questions.question: Network delay time using Dijkstra.
questions.snippet: priority_queue<pair<int,int>,vector<pair<int,int>>,greater<pair<int,int>>> pq; pq.push({0,k}); while(!pq.empty()){ auto cur=pq.top(); pq.pop(); int time=cur.first; int node=cur.second; for(auto &nei:graph[node]) pq.push({time+nei.second,nei.first}); }

questions.question: Find peak element.
questions.snippet: while(l<=r){ int mid=(l+r)/2; if(nums[mid]>nums[mid+1]) r=mid-1; else l=mid+1; } return l;

questions.question: Edit distance.
questions.snippet: for(int i=1;i<=m;i++){ for(int j=1;j<=n;j++){ if(a[i-1]==b[j-1]) dp[i][j]=dp[i-1][j-1]; else dp[i][j]=1+min({dp[i-1][j],dp[i][j-1],dp[i-1][j-1]}); } }

questions.question: Kth smallest element in sorted matrix.
questions.snippet: priority_queue<vector<int>,vector<vector<int>>,greater<vector<int>>> pq; for(int i=0;i<n;i++) pq.push({matrix[i][0],i,0}); for(int i=0;i<k;i++){ auto cur=pq.top(); pq.pop(); if(cur[2]+1<n) pq.push({matrix[cur[1]][cur[2]+1],cur[1],cur[2]+1}); } return pq.top()[0];

questions.question: Minimum spanning tree using Prim's algorithm.
questions.snippet: priority_queue<pair<int,int>,vector<pair<int,int>>,greater<pair<int,int>>> pq; pq.push({0,0}); while(!pq.empty()){ auto cur=pq.top(); pq.pop(); int node=cur.second; int weight=cur.first; if(vis[node]) continue; vis[node]=true; cost+=weight; for(auto &nei:graph[node]) pq.push({nei.second,nei.first}); }
